outcome_contract.why: The workflow now measures real token usage and shows that repeated stage-shell and thread carryover dominate cost, especially between analysis and plan.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: Add deterministic stage handoff packets so downstream DO stages can load bounded structured sidecars first, escalate to full upstream markdown only when needed, and preserve engineering coverage expectations across the whole workflow.

engineering_coverage.applicable: packet-first loading and clear fallback rules
telemetry examples and proof run include packet paths
typecheck/lint + fact-find/plan/coverage validators + real packet generation
one canonical packet contract plus generator schema
compact packet fields and packet-first load order
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: bounded context is the main performance goal

stage_payload.summary: Add a deterministic stage handoff packet generator in `packages/skill-runner`, define one canonical packet contract for `fact-find`, `analysis`, and `plan`, update the DO workflow docs and skills so downstream stages use packet-first progressive disclosure, and prove the flow with a persisted feature slug that emits real packet sidecars and workflow telemetry.
goals: reduce cross-stage context load by default,
lift the bounded summary work into deterministic code,
keep engineering coverage, validation, and task selection intact across the workflow.
non_goals: eliminating all remaining hidden thread/system overhead,
changing the ideas queue routing semantics.
constraints: packet generation must be deterministic and source-derived,
packet semantics must be defined in one canonical contract,
build still needs full task-block escalation on demand.
assumptions: `skill-runner` typecheck/lint plus artifact validators are sufficient proof for this change,
packet files can be treated as normal telemetry `--input-path` artifacts.
selected_approach: implement a generator and CLI wrapper in `packages/skill-runner`,
update the workflow guide and stage skills to require packet generation and packet-first loading,
prove the flow with a real feature slug and packet files.
Why planning is not reopening option selection:
analysis already rejected docs-only discipline and a larger runtime-handoff program for this increment.

task_briefs.title: Add deterministic stage handoff packet generation in skill-runner
task_briefs.deliverable: code-change in `packages/skill-runner` plus shell wrapper in `scripts/`

task_briefs.title: Wire packet-first progressive disclosure into the workflow contract and stage skills
Persist the workflow artifact chain, emit real packet sidecars, and validate end to end
task_briefs.deliverable: persisted workflow docs, packet sidecars, telemetry lines, and build record

validation_contracts: TC-01: packet generator and wrapper compile/lint and produce bounded packet files
TC-02: workflow contract and skills enforce packet-first loading consistently
TC-03: the persisted feature slug validates and emits packet-aware workflow telemetry
